title: The Devil Tribe Revived
overview: Lord Demon orders three demons to fight to the death. The winner will choose a human, Akira Fuodo, and assume his identity while trying to bring pain and suffering on the Earth.

title: Demon Sirene
overview: Xenon summons Sirene to discover if Devilman has really betrayed the Demon Tribe.

title: Demon Gelge
overview: Xenon sends the slug-type demon Gelge to kill Devilman.

title: Demon General, Xannin
overview: Demon General Xannin is selected to takeover Devilman's original mission. He dispatches to Japan with Demon Vetra.

title: The Sleeping Beauty, Zoldova
overview: A new student, Himura Iwao, arrives at Nakado Academy and challenges Akira to a race. During which, they stumble upon a cave and discover a sleeping woman. The woman is actually Lita, who was a human sympathizer from the Demon Tribe.

title: The Head of Rokfel
overview: Miki's father works to reconstruct the face of the skull of a young woman who died 200 years ago. Rokfel animates the skull and begins to wreak havoc in the city to lure out Devilman.

title: The Terrifying Puppet Emissary Zulu
overview: Puppeteer Zulu and Demon Abil set their sights on Miki.

title: Iyamon and Bauu
overview: Demon Iyamon disguises herself as a student in order to kill Miki. When her cover is blown by Devilman, her brother Bauu comes to her rescue.

title: The Brainwave Demon Gondroma
overview: Brainwave Demon Gondroma uses his powers to control animals and spread chaos in the human world.

title: Demon Gandee, the Walking Eye
overview: Devilman faces off against the Gan Triplets.

title: The Red Flowered Demon, Lafleur
overview: While pursuing Demon Lafleur, Devilman accidentally injures Miki's father. Akira and Miki get into a huge argument, and it seems as though their relationship is over.

title: The Fire Demon, Firem
overview: The mischievous demon Firem accompanies the behemoth Aguilar on his mission with Xannin. Devilman finally has a one-on-one match with Xannin.

title: The Proud Mermaim
overview: Xenon dispatches Demon Mermaim to assist Xannin in his fight against Devilman. She does not care for Xannin, and puts a spell on him to prevent his interference. Mermaim moves in and attacks the Makimura family while they are on vacation. As Devilman does battle with Mermaim, Xannin discovers Miki.

title: Challenge at the Realm of Ice
overview: Miki is rushed to the hospital after an altercation with Xannin. Furious, and heartbroken, Devilman swears to defeat the Demon Tribe once and for all. He flies to the Himalayas to settle things with Xenon, only to find the Tribe is gone. Himura appears and finally reveals his true identity.

title: Demon Evine Thousands of Arms
overview: The centaur-type, horned demon Evine uses mirrors to control people's arms.

title: Demon Genie, Living in Darkness
overview: During a meteor shower, all of the children in town start seeing a glowing red star. They soon begin receiving terrible nightmares and are driven to the point of insanity.

title: Stamp Demon Dagon
overview: Akira, Miki, Tare, and his friends come across a mysterious storyteller. The storyteller gives children stamps with monster designs on them. At night, the monsters come to life and attack.

title: The Silvery Mayako
overview: A beautiful young woman named Mayako begins working at Cafe Chaco. Her alluring beauty has smitten all of the males in town. When young boys start killing themselves over Mayako, Akira wonders if there's more behind her allure.

title: Demon Adal The Puppet Strategy
overview: Tare comes across a dumping ground with tons of mannequins. Later at night, he sees a mannequin in his room and attacks it with a hammer. It turns out the mannequin was Miki, who was killed by his attack. Distressed, Tare runs away from home.

title: Farewell, Demon Drango
overview: A new transfer student named Tomita arrives at Nakado Academy and takes a liking to Miki. This angers Akira, who views Tomita as a rival.

title: Demon Draw Loves Humans
overview: Demon Draw has a bottomless appetite and sets his eyes on Nakado Academy.

title: Demon Mughal The Illusionist
overview: Principal Pochi and Alphonne see Akira push Miki into a river. Akira is set on proving his innocence and finding Miki.

title: Demon Bera The Mystery of Tibet
overview: Tare has a fight with Miyo and ends up stowing away on his father's flight to Tibet. Akira and Miki go off to bring him back home. Meanwhile, Demon General Muxan enlists Bera to expand the Demon Tribe's territory. She reworks her plan to eliminate Akira and the Makimura family.

title: Demon Giacon, The Living Specter
overview: Demon Giacon uses his powers of possession to wreak havoc in the human world.

title: Evil General Muxan, The Great School Assault
overview: Tired of his failures, Muxan decides to go face Devilman himself. All of Nakado Academy is held captive in an alternate dimension.

title: The Snow Demon Lala
overview: Akira is captured by Demons Dodo and Demon Lala during a ski trip. Dodo disguises himself as Akira and plans on killing all of his friends.

title: Demon Jewel, Endless Desires
overview: Demon Lord Xenon places Demon Marshall Lacock in charge of operations. Meanwhile, Lala attempts to escape the insane asylum.

title: Demon Miniyon, the Devil's Pendant
overview: Lacock sends out her second servant, Miniyon to wreak havoc in the human world. He leaves his special pendant everywhere, which has the power to shrink anyone. Lala attempts to seduce Akira, much to his annoyance.

title: Demon Kenetos, the Mysterious Necklace
overview: Demon Kenetos leaves behind his cursed necklaces all over Japan. Anyone who puts it on, has their head transported into his realm. Akira's teacher Alphonne falls victim to Kenetos' scheme.

title: Demon Phizele, the Insane Shadow
overview: Demon Phizele has the ability to turn any human aggressive and violent. Miki, Lala, Tare, and Miyo have to fend off all the crazed humans while Devilman tries to find Phizele.

title: Demon Kilskey, the Crimson Tornado
overview: Demon Kilskey is dispatched by Lacock to kill Lala. Kilskey later reworks his plan to use Lala to lure Devilman into a trap.

title: Demon Aurora, The Sparkling Prison
overview: Demon Marshall Lacock orders Lala's best friend, Aurora, to kill her.

title: Demon Weathers, The Sun's Revolt
overview: Demon Weathers uses his powers of weather control to battle Devilman. Tare and Miyo attempt to save a dog named Hachi.

title: Demon Alron, The Terrifying Dress
overview: Upset at the pain Devilman has caused the Demon Marshall, Alron dispatches to Japan to kill him. Meanwhile, Lala is frustrated with her own stupidity and tries to find a way to cure it. Akira mocks her, saying only death can fix that. Lala attempts to kill herself, ultimately throwing herself at battle with Alron.

title: Demon Marshal Lacock, the Frozen Academy
overview: Mourning the loss of Alron, Demon Marshall Lacock disobeys Xenon's orders and goes to confront Devilman. She uses her powers to slow down time in the city, leaving only Akira and Lala out of the trance. Together, they battle against Lacock.

title: Demon Magdler, The Flying Lava
overview: Lala is killed by Demon Magdler. Devilman fights him to get revenge.

title: Demon Wooddou, The Enraged Greenery
overview: Demon Wooddou controls trees to attack humanity. While battling against Wooddou, Akira transforms in front of Tare.

title: Demon Dremoon, The Moon is Hell
overview: Demon Dremoon is using his powers to bring the Earth closer to the Moon. Devilman frantically searches for Dremoon before it's too late.

title: Demon God, The Miracles of God
overview: A series of unexplained events have been occurring all over the world. Akira realizes the only person who has such power is Xenon's Captain of Guard: Demon God. God warns Akira not to interfere, otherwise, he will reveal his identity to Miki.
